name: MetaMCP
description: MCP Aggregator, Orchestrator, Middleware, and Gateway in a single Docker container. MetaMCP lets you dynamically aggregate multiple MCP servers into a unified endpoint, apply middleware (auth, rate limiting, tool overrides), and expose them over SSE or Streamable HTTP transports with API-key or OAuth authentication. Acts as the control plane and lifecycle manager for all MCPs in the registry.

registry_integration.description: MetaMCP serves as the runtime manager for all servers listed in the AGenNext/mcp-registry. It ingests server definitions from registry-entry.json files, manages their lifecycle (start/stop/restart), tracks versions, handles authentication tokens per server, and exposes aggregated endpoints.
registry_integration.new_listing_workflow: Add registry-entry.json to a new folder in mcp-registry → MetaMCP auto-discovers and offers to register

registry_role_notes: MetaMCP is designated as the **MCP Manager** for the AGenNext/mcp-registry. It provides: (1) centralized version management for all 58+ registry servers, (2) per-server authentication and secrets management, (3) new MCP listing workflow via namespace/endpoint onboarding, (4) middleware layer for all registry traffic, (5) rate limiting and traffic management across servers.
